name: Check of books collections
fullName: Catalog Navigation: Check of books collections

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
When  Open categories by chain and chain starts from CategoryScreen:
And  Collections is Everything by default on subcategory screen
And  There are collection type by 'Everything' and 'Popular Books' on subcategory screen
